narrative:
Scott (precinct in Sandusky County) has 879 registered voters, with 53.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 35.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.8%, a pronounced Republican lean of 24.9 percentage points.
